question: Why did sepsis bundle-compliance dip for the cardiology service line last Tuesday?
metric_label: Sepsis bundle compliance by service line, daily

upstream_models.description: Patient encounters from Clarity EHR via Fivetran CDC. Includes encounter_date, department_id, admission_type, and service_line classification.
Vital signs and sepsis screening flags. Includes sepsis_alert_flag, lactate_drawn, lactate_redrawn_3h, and blood_culture_drawn indicators.
Clinical orders from the EHR. Includes antibiotic_administered, order_timestamp, and encounter linkage. Used to verify bundle elements completed within required 3-hour windows.
Patient master with admission source, payer, and care team assignments. Joins to encounters to split ER-admitted vs. floor-admitted cohorts.
